headline: 3 Reasons to Avoid BIIB and 1 Stock to Buy Instead
summary: Biogen’s 14.4% return over the past six months has outpaced the S&P 500 by 6.2%, and its stock price has climbed to $192.84 per share. This was partly due to its solid quarterly results, and the run-up might have investors contemplating their next move.

headline: Biogen Shares Decline After Detailed Diranersen Alzheimer's Study Data
summary: BIIB's Alzheimer's drug data presentation reaffirms a phase II setback as investors weigh plans to advance diranersen in phase III despite missed goals.

raw.headline: Biogen Shares Decline After Detailed Diranersen Alzheimer's Study Data
raw.summary: BIIB's Alzheimer's drug data presentation reaffirms a phase II setback as investors weigh plans to advance diranersen in phase III despite missed goals.

headline: Biogen Appoints Michael J. Parini as Chief Legal Officer
summary: CAMBRIDGE, Mass., July 15, 2026 (GLOBE NEWSWIRE) -- Biogen Inc. (Nasdaq: BIIB) today announced the appointment of Michael J. Parini as Chief Legal Officer, effective August 3, 2026. Parini will serve as a member of Biogen's Executive Committee and report to Christopher A. Viehbacher, President and Chief Executive Officer. In this role, Mr. Parini will have responsibility for oversight of Biogen’s global legal and compliance functions. “Michael brings to Biogen a rare combination of deep legal an

headline: AAIC26: Biogen stock drops after unveiling tau-targeting ASO data
summary: Data released by Biogen at AAIC26 appears to have spooked investors, with an 8.17% drop in share price.

headline: Tau In The Clinic, Again
summary: As evidence piled up that amyloid is not going to be the answer in Alzheimer's, tau has been on the upswing. Now we have another test: Diranersen, an antisense oligo from Biogen and Ionis.

raw.headline: Tau In The Clinic, Again
raw.summary: As evidence piled up that amyloid is not going to be the answer in Alzheimer's, tau has been on the upswing. Now we have another test: Diranersen, an antisense oligo from Biogen and Ionis.

headline: Biogen (BIIB) Following Fresh Alzheimer’s Data Is The Upside Story Still Intact
summary: Biogen (BIIB) is back in focus after fresh Alzheimer’s data, including new real world results for LEQEMBI and Phase 2 findings for tau targeting candidate diranersen, gave investors more information on the company’s neurology pipeline. See our latest analysis for Biogen. Despite the positive Alzheimer’s headlines, Biogen’s 1 day share price return was down 8.17% and the 7 day share price return was down 6.68%. However, the year to date share price return of 7.95% and 1 year total shareholder...
